description: All header navigation links (Home/okwasniewski, Blog, Portfolio, Videos, Contact) have correct routing in the DOM but are unclickable via pointer events (mouse/touch) on both mobile and desktop viewports due to 'pointer-events: none'. Navigation only works via keyboard or direct JS execution.

issues.name: Header navigation links are unclickable via pointer events (pointer-events: none)
issues.description: Expected: Header navigation links should be clickable using a mouse or touch device. Actual: All header navigation links (okwasniewski, blog, portfolio, videos, contact) have "pointer-events: none" in their computed style, making them unclickable via mouse or touch. They can only be interacted with via keyboard navigation.
reproductionSteps: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/ using any viewport (e.g. 375x812)
Try to click on the "blog", "portfolio", "videos", or "contact" links in the header.
Observe that the cursor does not change and clicking has no effect.
Verify using browser developer tools that the 'a' elements have 'pointer-events: none'.
issues.expectedBehavior: Header navigation links should be clickable using a mouse or touch device.
issues.actualBehavior: All header navigation links (okwasniewski, blog, portfolio, videos, contact) have "pointer-events: none" in their computed style, making them unclickable via mouse or touch. They can only be interacted with via keyboard navigation.
